query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, startTime, sport, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, modelTotal, modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread FROM games WHERE (awayTeam LIKE '%NYY%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%New York%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%Yankees%') AND (homeTeam LIKE '%SF%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%San Francisco%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%Giants%') ORDER BY startTime DESC LIMIT 5;
